summary_one_line: A valid TrueType sfnt header plus cmap table so hb_font_get_glyph maps the codepoint to a non-zero glyph (false branch).

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt font header: TrueType magic 00 01 00 00 at offset 0, a 'cmap' table tag, and a GSUB-family ('GSUN') table tag at fixed header offsets, so the font has a usable cmap and hb_font_get_glyph(font, first_u, ...) returns true and takes the blocked false branch at line 131.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the exact byte run 00 01 00 00 00 07 ff 80 ... 63 6d 61 70 ('cmap') at offsets 0x00-0x0f and 47 53 55 4e ('GSUN') near 0x1b, a consistent structured table directory that lets cmap resolve a glyph for first_u; the W role takes the false branch (T=1 F=8 at line 131).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are unstructured byte soup (e.g. f1 08 00 00 10 06 ..., 32 8a 8a 8a ...) with no sfnt magic and no cmap/GSUB tags at those offsets, so hb_font_get_glyph fails and continue is always taken (L role: line 131 T=10 F=0, branch never resolved across all 10 trials).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP. The cmap/sfnt table-tag comparisons (FOURCC magic checks during table lookup) are exact-match integer/string CMPs; I2SRandReplace copies the logged comparison operand directly into the input at the right offset, synthesizing the 'cmap'/'GSUN' tags and 00 01 00 00 magic that value_profile's distance-bucket gradient cannot land on an exact multi-byte literal in feasible time.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the false side of hb_font_get_glyph at line 131, which requires the codepoint to resolve to a glyph.
The winner resolves the branch 8/10 trials while the loser never does (0/10).
Winner-resolving seeds contain the TrueType sfnt magic and a 'cmap' table tag at the file head.
Winner seeds also carry a GSUB-family table tag near offset 0x1b.
Loser-blocking seeds are unstructured bytes with no sfnt magic at offset 0.
At the blocker line the W role takes the false branch but the L role takes only the true branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 131  T=1 F=8  T=10 F=0  if (!hb_font_get_glyph (font, first_u, 0, &first_glyph))  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The W and L byte sets differ sharply at the cmap-tag offsets, with W concentrated on the 'cmap' literal.
value_profile_cmplog uniquely adds the I2SRandReplace mutator over value_profile.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies only on havoc plus CMP_MAP distance buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5745 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed 9fc6580d81a8226f`; chain has 39 ancestor levels and the tool reports 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 38' (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only), the dash-row floor signal for an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating hb_font_get_glyph on a multi-byte FOURCC table tag where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient alone lands the exact tag without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact comparison whose operand I2S substitutes (sfnt magic check vs cmap FOURCC tag match vs codepoint lookup) is inferred from seed bytes and source, not directly traced to a logged CMP PC.
